name: Cornbread
recipeIngredient: 1/2 c Egg Beaters or other such substitute equal to 2 eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix dry ingredients together.
2. Add yogurt and egg substitute. Mix well.
3. Bake at 400°F for about 20 minutes in an 8-inch square or round pan (I use a cast iron skillet sprayed with Pam).
4. For cornsticks, halve the recipe and bake in a cast iron pan that makes muffins shaped like ears of corn for less time.
